main.description: A single docket entry (one filing event) and the documents attached to it. listRecords over this collection yields the full docket in order.

entryNumber.description: Docket entry number; may be absent for some minute/text entries.

recapSequenceNumber.description: CourtListener ordering key, preserves true docket order.

docPost.description: Backdated document post (dated archive entry) — takedown linkage.

announcePost.description: Realtime QT announcement post — takedown linkage.

document.description: A filed document. hash+link model: reference the upstream public URL and record the content CID for tamper-evidence, WITHOUT hosting the bytes.

sourceUrl.description: Public CourtListener storage URL for the PDF.

contentCid.description: CIDv1 (sha2-256, raw) of the PDF bytes — tamper-evidence. Absent until the doc has been fetched and hashed.

isAvailable.description: Whether the upstream document is currently retrievable.

postRef.description: Strong reference to a companion app.bsky.feed.post (takedown linkage).
